title: bursera cinerea
intro: Bursera cinerea, also known as the Mexican frankincense tree, is a plant species native to Mexico and Central America that belongs to the family Burseraceae. The resin of the Bursera cinerea plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a valuable treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Bursera cinerea resin include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve skin and wound healing, and provide relief from arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Bursera cinerea resin can be prepared into herbal preparations such as tinctures, salves, and essential oils, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
